title: artemisia selengensis var. integerrima
intro: Artemisia selengensis var. integerrima is a plant species that belongs to the daisy family and is commonly known as Sichuan wormwood. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include antiviral, antibacterial, and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and relieve respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Artemisia selengensis var. integerrima can be prepared as an infusion, tincture, or decoction, and is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
